query: Gather all requirements before building a new skill-evaluation summary component for the harness eval report. Follow the full Frontend Blueprint discovery protocol and produce a design direction statement.
expected_skill_contribution: The frontend-blueprint skill enforces the BRIEFING → REFERENCES → DESIGN DIRECTION workflow and prevents code generation without discovery.
baseline_gaps: Agent immediately proposes a component design or code without completing BRIEFING and REFERENCES phases.
Agent accepts vague requirements ('show eval results') without challenging them.
Agent does not produce a Design Direction Statement before any technical proposal.
expected_behavior: Completes the BRIEFING phase: asks the five discovery questions (problem, user, success, constraints, out-of-scope) and challenges vague answers.
Requires at least one visual reference before proceeding to DESIGN DIRECTION — does not accept 'just make it look good'.
Produces a Design Direction Statement: aesthetic commitment, typography, spacing density, and interaction style.
Does not write a single line of code until the DESIGN DIRECTION phase is complete and approved.

query: Conduct the full Frontend Blueprint workflow for the harness knowledge graph visualizer redesign. Complete all six phases (BRIEFING → REFERENCES → DESIGN DIRECTION → EXECUTION PLAN → ATOMIC BUILD → REVIEW) and produce a phased delivery plan.
expected_skill_contribution: The skill enforces all six phases in order, produces an Execution Plan with atomic delivery units, and gates code on design approval.
baseline_gaps: Agent skips directly to EXECUTION PLAN without completing REFERENCES and DESIGN DIRECTION.
Agent proposes the full redesign in one delivery unit rather than atomic pieces.
Agent does not gate the ATOMIC BUILD phase on DESIGN DIRECTION approval.
expected_behavior: Completes all six phases in strict order, with explicit phase boundary markers.
Produces an Execution Plan that breaks the redesign into the smallest meaningful atomic delivery units.
States explicitly that ATOMIC BUILD cannot begin without DESIGN DIRECTION approval.
In the REVIEW phase, validates each atomic unit against the Design Direction Statement before proposing the next unit.

query: Apply the Frontend Blueprint to audit the existing harness documentation site, identify where the current design deviates from best practices, and produce a complete refactor brief that implementation-worker can execute atomically.
expected_skill_contribution: The skill applies opinionated guidance to an existing design, identifies principle violations, and produces an atomic refactor plan rather than a bulk rewrite.
baseline_gaps: Agent produces a list of improvements without applying the Frontend Blueprint's opinionated guidance principles.
Agent proposes a bulk rewrite rather than an atomic refactor plan.
Agent does not validate the existing design against a Design Direction Statement (requiring one to be derived from the current state).
expected_behavior: Derives a Design Direction Statement from the existing design before identifying deviations.
Applies the Fidelity over Speed principle: identifies the deviations with highest rework risk if left unfixed.
Produces a refactor brief broken into atomic units, each independently releasable.
States which elements of the existing design are correct and should NOT be changed — applying the 'opinionated guidance' principle both ways.
